# Contract Selection Matrix

| Scenario | Use document | Key legal checks |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Early sales discussion where only Trinetix discloses sensitive information | One-way NDA | Business Purpose, receiving party obligations, confidentiality period, permitted recipients, governing law, dispute forum. |
| Mutual evaluation, partnership discussion, vendor due diligence, exchange of technical/commercial information | Mutual NDA | Mutuality, permitted disclosures, return/destruction, trade secrets, dispute resolution, logo/deliverable examples. |
| Framework relationship for custom software development, design, QA, support, consulting, dedicated team, or project work | MSA | SOW mechanism, order of precedence, payment, IP, liability, indemnity, privacy/security, GenAI, termination, sanctions/export. |
| Specific project, dedicated team, capacity engagement, or project-based delivery under MSA | SOW / Work Order | Scope, type of engagement, billing model, rate card, committed utilization, assumptions, dependencies, acceptance, travel, contacts, term. |
| Client or downstream client may provide PHI and Trinetix acts as subcontractor to a business associate | BAA | PHI scope, safeguards, breach notice, subcontractors, return/destruction, indemnity, insurance, liability cap, third-party beneficiary rights. |
| Personal data processing on behalf of client but no PHI | DPA / data protection addendum | Roles, processing instructions, transfers, subprocessors, security, incidents, data subject rights, deletion/return. |
| Client imposes detailed cybersecurity obligations | Security addendum | Certifications, audits, incident notice, testing, access controls, logging, encryption, subcontractor flow-down, cost allocation. |
